response.global_analysis: The video includes a merchandise introduction segment followed by two musical performances. The first song, 'Usada no Tamashii o', matches the provided Reference JSON phonetically and visually (on-screen lyrics). The second song, 'SANADANCE 戦CISE', uses a different verse than the JSON; I have prioritized the on-screen lyrics and audio for transcription. Timestamps are strictly aligned with the audio waveforms for speech and vocals.

subtitles.original: おっとっと、当たりましたかー？
subtitles.english: Oops, did I win?

subtitles.original: 楽しんでくれてますかー？
subtitles.english: Are you enjoying yourselves?

subtitles.original: 最後にもね、一曲ぺこらまた歌いますので、
subtitles.english: Lastly, I'll sing one more song,

subtitles.original: そちらもお楽しみにということで、ここからはグッズ紹介！
subtitles.english: so look forward to that too. And now, for the merchandise introduction!

subtitles.original: おっ、ペカった！
subtitles.english: Oh, it flashed!

subtitles.original: おー？ ということはー？
subtitles.english: Oh? Which means...?

subtitles.original: 来たー！ ペカったー！
subtitles.english: It's here! It flashed!

subtitles.original: ということで、兎田ぺこら活動6周年記念グッズを紹介するぺこ！
subtitles.english: So, I'm going to introduce Usada Pekora's 6th anniversary merchandise, peko!

subtitles.original: まず一つ目は、こちらから！ トゥルン！
subtitles.english: First up is this one! Ta-da!

subtitles.original: ぺこら推し法被！
subtitles.english: Pekora-oshi Happi!

subtitles.original: こちらは憂姫はぐれ先生に描いていただきました！
subtitles.english: This was illustrated by Yuki Hagure-sensei!

subtitles.original: もうね、着るだけで推しをアピールできる
subtitles.english: Just wearing it lets you show off your oshi...

subtitles.original: イベントでも着てきてほしいぺこです！
subtitles.english: ...and I'd love for you to wear it to events, peko!

subtitles.original: めちゃめちゃ可愛い法被ぺこなので、是非ともよろ！
subtitles.english: It's a super cute happi, so please check it out!

subtitles.original: そして、二つ目は、こちら！ トゥルン！
subtitles.english: And the second one is this! Ta-da!

subtitles.original: な、な、なんと！ ついにぺこらマミーも写っているグッズが出てしまいました！
subtitles.english: Wh-Wh-What?! Finally, merchandise featuring Pekora's Mammy has been released!

subtitles.original: こちら、ラバーマットです！
subtitles.english: This is a rubber mat!

subtitles.original: イラストはひこさんにお願いしております！
subtitles.english: The illustration is by Hikosam!

subtitles.original: テーマは『カジノ』の兎田ぺこらとぺこらマミーです！
subtitles.english: The theme is 'Casino' Usada Pekora and Pekora Mammy!

subtitles.original: ついに出てしまった、マミーが！
subtitles.english: Mammy has finally made an appearance!

subtitles.original: だからね、是非ともぺこらマミー大好きな人も、お手に取ってもらえると嬉しいぺこです！
subtitles.english: So I'd be happy if all the Pekora Mammy fans out there could get their hands on one, peko!

subtitles.original: そして、ラバーマットがあるということは、三つ目は、こちら！
subtitles.english: And since there's a rubber mat, the third one is this!

subtitles.original: はい、カードスリーブもちゃんとあるぺこです！
subtitles.english: Yes, we have card sleeves too, peko!

subtitles.original: 60枚入りでね、イラストは先ほどと同じひこさんにお願いしております。
subtitles.english: It's a pack of 60, with the illustration by Hikosam again.

subtitles.original: なんとこちら、ホロカでも使えますので！
subtitles.english: And these can even be used for HoloCae!

subtitles.original: 是非ともホロカで遊んでる方は使っていただけると嬉しいぺこです！
subtitles.english: So I'd be happy if those playing HoloCae would use them, peko!

subtitles.original: そして、四つ目は、こちら！
subtitles.english: And the fourth one is this!

subtitles.original: 可愛いね、ぺこーらぬいぐるみキーホルダー！
subtitles.english: It's so cute, the Peko-ra plushie keyholder!

subtitles.original: カバンにつけてもよし、旅行先に持っていくのもよしの...
subtitles.english: Great for attaching to your bag or taking on trips...

subtitles.original: 持ち運びやすいサイズのぬいぐるみとなってるぺこ！
subtitles.english: ...it's a plushie that's just the right size for carrying around, peko!

subtitles.original: こちら、なんとフルセット購入の特典がございます！
subtitles.english: And there's actually a bonus for purchasing the full set!

subtitles.original: 数量限定で直筆サイン入りポストカードがあります！
subtitles.english: There's a limited number of postcards with handwritten signatures!

subtitles.original: 通常バージョンは箔押し複製サイン入りのポストカードとなっておりまして、
subtitles.english: The regular version comes with a postcard with a foil-stamped replica signature,

subtitles.original: はぐれ先生の法被のイラストとなっております！
subtitles.english: featuring Hagure-sensei's happi illustration!

subtitles.original: 是非ともじゃんじゃんバリバリ買ってぺこー！
subtitles.english: So please go ahead and buy them up, peko!

subtitles.original: それでは、最後は何の曲かな？ お楽しみに！
subtitles.english: Now then, what's the last song? Look forward to it!

subtitles.original: おっ？ あれ？ エラー？
subtitles.english: Oh? Huh? An error?

subtitles.original: 係員をお呼びください
subtitles.english: Please call a staff member

subtitles.original: ちょっと！ 店員！ ライブできないライブできない！
subtitles.english: Wait! Clerk! I can't do the live, I can't do the live!

subtitles.original: 係員をお呼びください
subtitles.english: Please call a staff member

subtitles.original: 直してちょうだい！
subtitles.english: Fix it please!

subtitles.original: おい、監視カメラ見えてんだろ！ おーい、どこだどこだ？
subtitles.english: Hey, you can see me on the surveillance camera! Hey, where are you?

subtitles.original: 係員をお呼びください
subtitles.english: Please call a staff member

subtitles.original: 直して早く！ ライブできないぺこだよ！
subtitles.english: Fix it fast! I can't do the live, peko!

subtitles.original: 係員をお呼びください
subtitles.english: Please call a staff member

subtitles.original: 叩いててもダメぺこでしょう！
subtitles.english: Tapping it won't help, will it!

subtitles.original: 叩いて蹴っても直らないだろ！ ちょっと、しっかり！
subtitles.english: Tapping and kicking it won't fix it! Hey, come on!

subtitles.original: おっ、直った。 あれ？
subtitles.english: Oh, it's fixed. Huh?

subtitles.original: 仮想の世に生まれ 生きること
subtitles.english: Born in a virtual world, to live

subtitles.original: 即ち 戦い、勝つこと
subtitles.english: Is to fight and win

subtitles.original: 時代と戦い 己が宿命と戦い
subtitles.english: Fight against the era, fight against one's own fate

subtitles.original: 己自身に打ち勝つ
subtitles.english: Overcome oneself

subtitles.original: いつの世も大差はなし
subtitles.english: In any age, there is no big difference

subtitles.original: 人の生き様が
subtitles.english: The way people live

subtitles.original: 一瞬の煌めきが
subtitles.english: The fleeting sparkle

subtitles.original: 歴史を紡いでいく
subtitles.english: Spins history

subtitles.original: 今こそ胸に刻め
subtitles.english: Now, engrave it in your heart

subtitles.original: 我が生き様を！
subtitles.english: My way of life!

subtitles.original: 戦の炎 灯してみせよう
subtitles.english: The flames of war, I shall set them alight

subtitles.original: 永久に語り継げ
subtitles.english: Keep telling it forever

subtitles.original: 兎田の魂を
subtitles.english: The soul of Usada!

subtitles.original: Are you ready?
subtitles.english: Are you ready?

subtitles.original: Shall We Dance? 始めよう
subtitles.english: Shall We Dance? Let's begin

subtitles.original: 勝利の祝杯あげる前に
subtitles.english: Before raising the victory toast

subtitles.original: Relax Your Body 深呼吸
subtitles.english: Relax Your Body, take a deep breath

subtitles.original: そうすりゃだんだん高まる
subtitles.english: Then the tension will gradually rise

subtitles.original: Passion, Force
subtitles.english: Passion, Force
